name: Granite Crumbler
notes: Fort Irongrad Tank Plant exclusive (not shared with Frostworks) — the heavy-tier long-range indirect siege tank, the highest-range and highest-per-hit-damage unit in the roster, with splash from its shell impact. Cannot target Infantry or Air at all (omitted from canTarget) — a big indirect shell isn't built to hunt scattered riflemen or planes far above it, and it gives Infantry a hard counter-role against heavy armor rather than just a damage-modifier penalty. Bonuses vs. Structure (2.0x) and Defensive (1.6x) make it a strong wall/HQ/base-defense cracker and double as target-priority hints per the damage-modifier rule (see game-design/05-troop-stat-schema.md); both Structure and Defensive already auto-aggro by default whenever no enemy troop is in range, same as Basekiller, since the schema's canTarget rule applies uniformly rather than through any unit-specific flag. Slowest heavy tank and highest Fuel upkeep, reflecting its size.
